content.en:
"How do you choose the strongest 100,000 True Ancestors?"

Someone asked.

Hebo True Ancestor said with a smile: "It's very simple, like the announcement of this news everywhere in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, all True Ancestors who are within the age of 10 million years can participate, and then let them enter a world to fight, and the 100,000 True Ancestors who survive in the end are the strongest True Ancestors." If you don't dare to continue fighting, you can quit, but once you quit, you will be eliminated!

"In this case, I'm afraid that a lot of True Ancestors will fall, basically the top geniuses who can step into the ranks of True Ancestors in tens of thousands of years, it would be a pity to fall too much!"

"It's a pity?" Hebo Zhenzu said sarcastically: "How precious is the Natal Talent Tree, plus those forbidden and strange things, if we can't get in, otherwise you are already fighting together, what's the pity! This is a big opportunity, who doesn't want it? If you're afraid of death, then don't sign up!"

"When does it start?"

Someone else asked.

"A hundred years from now, so there will be plenty of time!"

Hebo Zhenzu proposed.

The other True Ancestors didn't have any opinions, and they all agreed.

Then, many True Ancestors put forward some other suggestions, all of which were some detailed things, and Ye Tian didn't speak the whole time, after all, there was nothing to talk about.

Soon after, the meeting ended.

Subsequently, a true ancestor left.

Back to the Terrans.

Ye Tian called his son Ye Xingchen and daughter Ye Xingyue.

"Xingchen, Xingyue, this time a forbidden treasure was born, anyone over the age of 10 million cannot enter, this age is based on the time of birth, and has nothing to do with the time when time accelerates, do you want to enter?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Xingchen immediately responded.

Ye Xingyue also nodded.

They have always wanted to enter the forbidden treasure land, but unfortunately Ye Tian has not allowed it, because it is too dangerous there, and if they are not careful, they will fall, and even the strongest true ancestor has no certainty of saving their lives, and they are just top true ancestors.

"This time there is some danger, but the opportunity is very great, otherwise I wouldn't have come to tell you! Let's talk about the danger first, there are a large number of forbidden bloodline creatures in that forbidden treasure land, and some of them are comparable to the forbidden bloodline creatures of the True Ancestor. In addition, you still need to go through a fight, and only 100,000 True Ancestors are allowed to enter the Forbidden Treasure Land. "

"Let's talk about opportunities, there are many forbidden and strange things in the forbidden treasure land, but the most precious treasure is the natal talent tree, you should all know the Dao-level natal talent, your mother and I both have Dao-level natal talent, but it is very difficult for you to obtain the Dao-level natal talent, and taking the natal talent fruit can give birth to the Dao-level natal talent. If you have obtained the Dao-level natal talent, you can have the Dao-level natal talent, and it will be much easier to cultivate the Dao technique in the future!"

Ye Tian said.

In fact, he also wanted to give Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue the Dao-level natal talent that he couldn't use, but in order to sharpen them, he didn't do so, and when his son and daughter were making slow progress in the True Ancestor layer in the future, he would give them Dao-level natal talent.

But this time they don't need it, if they get the natal talent fruit, they can give birth to a Dao-level natal talent by themselves.

Moreover, this is also an opportunity to sharpen, and it is not too dangerous for Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue, who are already top True Ancestors.

After all, there are not many people who can cultivate to the top True Ancestor before tens of millions of years old, and they are basically the core geniuses of the major forces, and they are often cultivated with time formations and a large number of forbidden and strange things, so they can do this.

In other words, if it is the environment of the previous universe, even if you cultivate for a thousand trillion years, add 100 million, you can't cultivate to the top true ancestor!

For example, Ye Tian, how terrible his talent is, but because he has no resources, it took a long time to cultivate to the Heavenly Monarch level, if it were now, the cultivation speed would be a waste material!

There are still a hundred years left, and Ye Tian is ready to use this time to improve the strength of Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue again.

It is not realistic to let them rise from the top True Ancestor's combat power to the strongest True Ancestor all at once, unless it is to use some special method to exhaust their potential, but in that case, it is equivalent to abolishing them.

But Ye Tian knew very well that for the sake of those forbidden treasures and natal talent fruits, maybe there would be a big force that would forcibly improve the strength of some True Ancestors, and then promise to reincarnate them and cultivate them in the second life.

Once that is done, it is really possible for those True Ancestors to be upgraded to the top True Ancestors, or even to the level of the Supreme True Ancestors individually, even if they will die in a short time, but there is hope to obtain a lot of Natal Talent Fruits!

It's a good deal!

But Ye Tian can't do this, he can't kill his son and daughter!

Therefore, he must adopt alternative methods to improve the strength of his children.

His method is very simple, one is 100,000 times the time array, and if it takes a hundred years, it is equivalent to 10 million years, so that he can have a lot more time to cultivate;

Ordinary people didn't dare to use this method, and Dao Ancestors didn't dare to do it, because their origin power could not be born naturally, but Ye Tian was a supreme true ancestor, and the power of origin was endless, so he could use this method.

And only Ye Tian was willing to do this, and other Supreme True Ancestors wouldn't waste time helping a certain True Ancestor to continuously refine his physical body, wouldn't that be tantamount to giving up cultivation?

He wouldn't have done it if it weren't for his own children.

There is a third way, that is, to use that small piece of forbidden mother stone, a 10,000-year-old treasure, to improve the strength of Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue, although it will consume a part of the forbidden mother stone, but it is enough to make the strength of the two of them soar.

As for whether he can reach the Supreme True Ancestor level, Ye Tian doesn't dare to guarantee it, but there is definitely hope.

Next, Ye Tian arranged a 100,000-fold time array, and let his wife Xiao Yue preside over the large array all the time, otherwise the 100,000-fold time array would not be maintained at all, which was already the limit time acceleration within the rules.

At the beginning, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor personally urged Ye Tian to speed up 100,000 times to do it, but it was also consumed very quickly.

Therefore, in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, the normal use of time acceleration is 10,000 times the time, and 100,000 times the time acceleration not only requires a lot of resources, but also requires people to preside over it all the time, which is not cost-effective.

At this special moment, Ye Tian naturally needed to arrange a time array that was 100,000 times faster.

The large array was arranged, and Ye Tian began to let Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue use the forbidden mother stone to cultivate, and he also began to mobilize the power of the origin, turning into two silk threads that penetrated from their heads, constantly refining their physical bodies.

This kind of tempering is extremely painful, after all, it does not come from their own strength, but in order to quickly improve their strength, they must endure it.

Like others, there is no such treatment at all.

In this way, time passed slowly, and the strength of Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue became stronger and stronger, gradually approaching the extreme of the top true ancestor.

In the outside world, other forces have also begun to use the last time to cultivate the true ancestors under the age of 10 million.

Of course.

In just a hundred years, it will definitely not be possible to improve the strength by normal means.

They don't have a forbidden mother stone, they don't have many forbidden dao stones, and they won't take a large number of forbidden strange things to improve the strength of these true ancestors, and even if they do, it's too late.

As a result, most of the forces adopted the method of squeezing their potential to frantically improve the strength of these True Ancestors, and even did not hesitate to exhaust their vitality in order to maintain their peak state for hundreds of years.

Once hundreds of years have passed, they will die and will have to pay a huge price to send them into samsara.

And the price of the true ancestor entering the reincarnation is different from the reincarnation of the true monarch and the heavenly monarch.

If they have gained great merit and hope to enter samsara, once they have not received any merit, then they are really dead.

In the blink of an eye, a hundred years have passed.

this day.

In the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm, a large number of young True Ancestors rushed to the Vajra True Kingdom, most of them were very weak in strength, and a considerable number of True Ancestors had just been promoted.

Of course, since they are all geniuses, their combat effectiveness will not be too weak, either between ordinary True Ancestors and Elite True Ancestors, or they will directly break through to the ranks of Elite True Ancestors, but there are very few powerhouses at the top True Ancestor level.

As for the young True Ancestor of the strongest True Ancestor's combat power, it has not yet been exposed.

And Ye Tian and Xiao Yue also came to the King Kong True Kingdom with a pair of children.
